properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 13/14
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT (DATE TIME) UTC (MONTH) (YEAR). 
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
   (POS AND NAME OF RIGS)
   NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
        B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
           WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
     2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX (MELDINGSNUMMER/AARSTALL)
